criteria.text: GET /api/financials returns 200 { weekly, daily }; weekly depositsByDay/totalDeposits/variableSpend/netContribution (last,prior); daily depositYesterday + variableSpend
variable spend excludes purchases with AccountRef in QBO_FIXED_ACCOUNT_IDS; netContribution = deposits - variable spend
dates use practice-zone company-local TxnDate; yesterday KPI + per-day grouping no UTC off-by-one
QBO not connected -> 503 source_not_connected; UI shows Connect not logout
financials read audit-logged at HTTP layer (method path -> status); no tokens/secrets logged
